entity_types.name: LiteraryWork
entity_types.description: A creative work of literature, such as a book, novella, or story.

entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: A company, institution, or other organized group of people.

entity_types.name: Language
entity_types.description: A system of communication used by a particular country or community.

entity_types.name: Award
entity_types.description: A prize or other mark of recognition given in honor of an achievement.

entity_types.name: ArtForm
entity_types.description: A specific mode of artistic expression or representation.

entity_types.name: Event
entity_types.description: A planned public or social occasion.
examples: XIII Biannual Book Fair of Rio de Janeiro

entity_types.name: CreativeWork
entity_types.description: A creative work that is not necessarily literary, such as a sculpture, painting, or film.

relation_groups.name: Literary Creation
relation_groups.description: Relations describing the creation, publication, and translation of literary works.

relations.name: writes
relations.detail: describes a person as the author of a literary work

relations.name: illustrates
relations.detail: describes a person as the illustrator of a literary work

relations.name: publishes
relations.detail: describes an organization as the publisher of a literary work

relations.name: translates_into
relations.detail: describes a literary work being translated into a specific language

relations.name: translated_by
relations.detail: describes a person as the translator of a literary work

relation_groups.name: Adaptation and Influence
relation_groups.description: Relations describing how literary works are adapted into other forms or influence other creations.

relations.name: adapted_into
relations.detail: describes a literary work being adapted into a different art form

relations.name: inspired
relations.detail: describes one literary work inspiring another

relations.name: narrated_by
relations.detail: describes an art form being narrated by a person

relation_groups.name: Recognition and Commemoration
relation_groups.description: Relations describing awards, honors, and commemorative actions related to literary works or individuals.

relations.name: receives
relations.detail: describes a person receiving an award

relations.name: honors
relations.detail: describes an event honoring a person

relations.name: dedicated_to
relations.detail: describes a literary work being dedicated to a person

relations.name: established_by
relations.detail: describes an award being established by an organization

relation_groups.name: Geographical Context
relation_groups.description: Relations describing the geographical context of literary works, events, or individuals.

relations.name: located_in
relations.detail: describes an organization being located in a specific geographical location

relations.name: set_in
relations.detail: describes a literary work being set in a specific geographical location

relations.name: resides_in
relations.detail: describes a person residing in a specific geographical location

relation_groups.name: Creative Work Relationships
relation_groups.description: Relations describing the creation, adaptation, and inspiration between various creative works.

relations.name: adapted_from
relations.detail: describes a creative work being adapted from a literary work

relation_groups.name: Personal Connections
relation_groups.description: Relations describing personal relationships and influences between individuals.

relations.name: modeled_after
relations.detail: describes a character or element in a creative work being modeled after a person
